course_page.rationale: A Moodle mod/page activity is a first-party navigable page surface and should be audited as a web page.

course_quiz.rationale: A Moodle mod/quiz activity represents a quiz interaction surface and maps directly to quiz_page.

course_lti.rationale: A Moodle mod/lti activity is the launch point into an external tool and maps directly to lti_launch.

course_link.rationale: A Moodle mod/url activity is the course-owned launch surface. The destination resource is classified separately when the crawler discovers it as a PDF, media file, or embed.
